text: Congratulations on becoming a parent! This is such wonderful news, and I am genuinely thrilled for you. Welcome to one of life's great adventures. I hope these early days are filled with all the snuggles, tiny yawns, and quiet moments of awe that make it so special, even when you are running on very little sleep. You are going to be a wonderful parent, and your little one is lucky to have you. Wishing your growing family so much love, health, and happiness in this new chapter. Enjoy every moment, and do not hesitate to lean on the people around you when you need a break.
